content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the changes addressing two prior amendments: (1) bead_status multi-match filtering in the milestone controller, and (2) active milestone sync from project selection and run start/resume. Both amendments are properly addressed. The bead_status function now correctly filters BrShowResponse results against the current milestone using milestone_bead_refs_match, handling both Single and Many variants with proper disambiguation. The active milestone sync is wired into project select, run start, and run resume, and resolve_active_milestone has a clean fallback to the active project's task_source.milestone_id. All four new tests pass. No critical or high-severity issues found.

## Amendments

None.
